variants: Residing in Floodplain Glade, Danica Markova was born in Cranewing Ridge. She is the recipient of the Jade Lantern Prize, awarded for her exceptional innovative work. One of her major achievements is the Sunlace Condenser, an invention that enhances energy efficiency. Furthermore, Danica is an active member of the Bloomgate Bards Assembly, where she collaborates with other artists and storytellers to promote creativity and culture.
